title: MaceCooldown
description: This is a plugin that adds a cooldown to the mace
body:
[![Craftlands](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1456750543254061199/1457164304016085246/CREATE_SERVER_6.png?ex=695b0182&is=6959b002&hm=a2cb2f7c066a0720fb2c2c4731c303fe0ba9aabc6e13418454c31a8482656f0b&)](https://portal.craftlands.host/aff.php?aff=137)

# **MaceCooldown - Balanced PvP Combat Plugin**

MaceCooldown is a lightweight plugin designed to bring balance to the mace. Since maces are kind of overpowered because of their spammable capabilities. This plugin solves that problem by implementing a cooldown system that prevents mace spam while maintaining the weapon's overpowered capabilities.
